_comment: FritzTrack4U config. Copy to config.json and fill in your real values. NO real data below - only placeholders. Works with 1 box, 1 box + 1 repeater, or N boxes. More boxes = more accurate room match. Any '_comment' key is ignored by the daemon.
_comment_minimal: MINIMAL SETUP (uncomment / use as 'boxes' if you only have 1 FritzBox + 1 repeater). Example: [ {"name":"FritzBox","ip":"192.168.178.1","floor":"Ground floor","floor_nr":0,"user":"YOUR_USER","password":"YOUR_PASSWORD"}, {"name":"Repeater","ip":"192.168.178.2","floor":"Upper floor","floor_nr":1,"user":"YOUR_USER","password":"YOUR_PASSWORD"} ]

boxes._comment: Each box: name (shown everywhere), ip (TR-064 on port 49000), floor (free text), floor_nr (sort order), and FritzBox login. Per-box user/password override the global 'fritzbox' block below.
boxes.name: FritzBox

fritzbox._comment: Optional global FritzBox credentials used for any box that does NOT set its own user/password.

_comment_devices: Tracked phones: MAC address -> friendly name. Use real MACs of the phones you want to locate.
_comment_exclude_names: Device names ignored for guest detection (smart-home gear, printers, neighbours). Any WLAN device not in 'devices' and not listed here is reported as a guest.

fingerprints._comment: Optional per-floor room fingerprints: floor -> room -> { box_name: expected_signal_percent }. The strongest box picks the floor; the fingerprint then picks the room within fingerprint_tolerance. Omit a floor to resolve floor-only.

mqtt._comment: Optional. If enabled=false the daemon only writes SQLite + stdout. If enabled=true but paho-mqtt is missing, MQTT is auto-disabled with a friendly hint.

_comment_smoothing: smoothing_window: rolling average window per MAC (>=1; 1 = disabled). Stabilises room decisions against signal jitter.
_comment_penalty: fingerprint_missing_penalty: extra deviation points per box that is in the fingerprint but not observed. Higher = prefers complete multi-box matches.

debug._comment: HTTP debug server (stdlib, localhost only, read-only). http_enabled=true starts the server. live_mode=true forces the 3s live cadence (same as --live CLI flag).
debug._comment_mesh_ttl: mesh_ttl: seconds between mesh topology re-fetches. Mesh changes rarely; 30s is the default. Increase to reduce SOAP load on the master box.
